CheckTitle: Okta password policies require uppercase characters
Description: **Okta Password Policy uppercase complexity** should require at least one uppercase character in every active policy.
Risk: **Missing uppercase complexity requirements** reduce password search space and create inconsistent protections across active password policies.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: **Require at least one uppercase character in every active Okta Password Policy** so all policy assignments enforce the same baseline complexity.
